package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_async_concurrency_select_default_busy_poll: Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag select loops with default branches that spin instead of blocking or using timers.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule508PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario508Positive(records []Rule508PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
